SIEGFRIEDSABER-SIEGFRIED.title: Siegfried
SIEGFRIEDSABER-SIEGFRIED.description: The dragon-slayer of the Nibelungenlied, his skin hardened by a bath in Fafnir's blood: Dragon Scales turn aside almost every blow — all but the one that finds his back. He endures, charges Balmung, and the longer his scales hold the sharper his Noble Phantasm cuts. A selfless, apologetic bruiser with no Magic Resistance. Sumanai.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-SIEGFRIED.goldMonologue: Gold? Give it to those who still have dreams left to buy. I need only a blade and a reason to raise it.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-SIEGFRIED.eventDeathPreve: Not yet — there are still those I have not finished protecting. Forgive me. I cannot fall here.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-SIEGFRIED.aromaPrinciple: For the dragon I was, and the hero I could not be, I will atone with this blade — for your sake, not my own.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-SIEGFRIED.banter.alive.en: Stay behind me. Everything before me, my scales will turn — leave the front to a knight.
SIEGFRIEDSABER-SIEGFRIED.banter.dead.end: My scales run thin... then I will meet the next blow with flesh, as I always should have.
